ddls:
CREATE TABLE "change_requests" (
  "crq_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each change request */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer initiating the change request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the change request (e.g., Pending, Scheduled, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "change_timing" TEXT /* Timing of the change (e.g., Standard, Emergency) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Scheduled start time for the change */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Scheduled end time for the change */,
  "coordinator_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coordinator group responsible for the change */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the change request */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the change request (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the change on the system (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the change (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "sla_deadline" TEXT /* Service level agreement deadline for the change */,
  "related_ticket_ids" TEXT /* Related ticket IDs from integrated ticketing systems */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_change_timing FOREIGN KEY ("change_timing") REFERENCES change_types ("change_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_coordinator_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("coordinator_group_id") REFERENCES coordinator_groups ("coordinator_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES change_statuses ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., Enterprise, SMB) */,
  "sla_level" TEXT /* Service level agreement level for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coordinator_groups" (
  "coordinator_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinator group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the coordinator group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coordinator group */,
  "group_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead of the coordinator group */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the coordinator group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinator_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coordinator_groups_group_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_types" (
  "change_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change type */,
  "change_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the change type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change type */,
  "approval_process_id" INTEGER /* ID linking to the specific approval process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "next_status_id" INTEGER /* Possible next status for workflow management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_statuses_next_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("next_status_id") REFERENCES change_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., IT Administrator, Coordinator, Approver) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval action */,
  "crq_id" TEXT /* ID of the change request being approved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the request */,
  "approval_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the approval action */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., Approved, Rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made during the approval process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_crq_id FOREIGN KEY ("crq_id") REFERENCES change_requests ("crq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "crq_id" TEXT /* ID of the change request related to the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Email, SMS) */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_crq_id FOREIGN KEY ("crq_id") REFERENCES change_requests ("crq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change history entry */,
  "crq_id" TEXT /* ID of the change request being modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change action */,
  "change_action" TEXT /* Type of change action (e.g., Status Update, Approval) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change made */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_history_crq_id FOREIGN KEY ("crq_id") REFERENCES change_requests ("crq_id")
)
